---
title: "Wordbank"
subtitle: "An open database of children's vocabulary development"
---

Wordbank archives data from the [MacArthur-Bates Communicative Development
Inventories](https://mb-cdi.stanford.edu/) (CDIs), parent-report instruments
that measure early language development. Data are contributed by researchers
around the world and are freely available for browsing, visualization, and
download.

{{< include _load-instruments.qmd >}}

```{ojs stats-cards}
html`<div class="stats-row">
  <div class="stat-card"><div class="stat-n">${stats.n_administrations.toLocaleString()}</div><div class="stat-label">CDI administrations</div></div>
  <div class="stat-card"><div class="stat-n">${stats.n_children.toLocaleString()}</div><div class="stat-label">children</div></div>
  <div class="stat-card"><div class="stat-n">${stats.n_languages}</div><div class="stat-label">languages</div></div>
  <div class="stat-card"><div class="stat-n">${stats.n_instruments}</div><div class="stat-label">instruments</div></div>
</div>`
```

## Explore

- [Item Trajectories](trajectories.qmd) — how individual words are acquired
  across ages
- [Data](data.qmd) — browse and download the full dataset on Redivis

## Citation

Frank, M. C., Braginsky, M., Yurovsky, D., & Marchman, V. A. (2017).
Wordbank: An open repository for developmental vocabulary data.
*Journal of Child Language, 44*(3), 677–694.
